task_name: Add Custom Theme System to T3 Code Editor

plan_metrics.plan_content: The plan is ready for your review. It covers all 4 requirements — shared theme types with 3 built-in themes, an evolved `useTheme()` hook with localStorage persistence and CSS custom property application, a swatch-based theme selector component, and integration into the existing settings page. The approach preserves full backward compatibility with the existing light/dark toggle system.
